name: Flawless Perfection of the Tenyi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>崩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: All non-Effect Monsters on the field are unaffected by monster effects. Once per turn, if your opponent Special Summons an Effect Monster(s), while you control a face-down monster or non-Effect Monster (except during the Damage Step): You can draw 2 cards.
eff: All non-Effect Monsters on the field are unaffected by monster effects. Once per turn, if your opponent Special Summons an Effect Monster(s), while you control a face-down monster or non-Effect Monster (except during the Damage Step): You can draw 2 cards.
